zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Francis Greene於1655年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治時，她的父親Lewis Greene28歲，母親Sarah Davis27歲。她於1677年12月與John William Massey III結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1689年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州布盧斯維其可享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Francis Greene于1655年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治时，她的父亲Lewis Greene28岁，母亲Sarah Davis27岁。她于1677年12月与John William Massey III结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1689年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州布盧斯維其可享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Francis Greene was born in 1655, in Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Lewis Greene, was 28 and her mother, Sarah Davis, was 27. She married John William Massey III in December 1677. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1689, in Brunswick, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 34.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Francis Greene(이)가 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프린스 조지 프린스 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lewis Greene(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Davis(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1677년 12월 John William Massey III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1689년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 브런스윅에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Francis Greene родилась в 1655 г. в местности принц джеордж, принц джеордж, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Lewis Greene было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Davis, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John William Massey III декабрь 1677 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1689 г. в местности брунсвикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Francis Greene nació en 1655, en Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Lewis Greene, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Davis, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John William Massey III en diciembre de 1677. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1689, en Brunswick, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años.
